steps.title: Identify the starting amount
steps.content: The model starts when the article was first featured, at $t=0$. The number of comments then was $35$, so the exponential model begins with coefficient $35$.

steps.title: Convert increase to multiplier
steps.content:
An increase by $180\%$ means the new amount is the old amount plus $1.80$ times the old amount:
$$1+1.80=2.80$$

steps.title: Write the exponential model
steps.content:
Use the starting amount and hourly multiplier:
$$C=35(2.8)^t$$
The answer is D.
